scenarios.description: Local e2e smoke composition using stack, observability, datasets, and load smoke checks.
scenarios.entrypoint: make ops-e2e-smoke

scenarios.description: Kubernetes invariant suite composed with stack and observability dependencies.
scenarios.entrypoint: make ops-k8s-suite

scenarios.description: Realdata regression scenarios with dataset and observability checks.
scenarios.entrypoint: make ops-realdata

scenarios.description: Perf-oriented end-to-end scenario composing load suites with stack and datasets.
scenarios.entrypoint: make ops-up

scenarios.description: Small dataset end-to-end on a single node and single shard.
scenarios.entrypoint: bijux dev atlas ops scenario run --scenario minimal-single-node

scenarios.description: Medium dataset scenario with multiple shards on one node.
scenarios.entrypoint: bijux dev atlas ops scenario run --scenario medium-single-node

scenarios.description: Two datasets loaded with shared index query validation.
scenarios.entrypoint: bijux dev atlas ops scenario run --scenario multi-dataset

scenarios.description: Dataset schema evolves from v1 to v2 with compatibility verification.
scenarios.entrypoint: bijux dev atlas ops scenario run --scenario schema-evolution

scenarios.description: Transient ingest parse error followed by retry and success.
scenarios.entrypoint: bijux dev atlas ops scenario run --scenario ingest-retry

scenarios.description: Cursor pagination invariants remain stable across pages.
scenarios.entrypoint: bijux dev atlas ops scenario run --scenario query-pagination

scenarios.description: Filters and projection semantics produce deterministic outputs.
scenarios.entrypoint: bijux dev atlas ops scenario run --scenario query-filter-projection

scenarios.description: Empty cache cold-start behavior and first-request latency.
scenarios.entrypoint: bijux dev atlas ops scenario run --scenario cold-start

scenarios.description: Warm cache startup behavior and query latency stability.
scenarios.entrypoint: bijux dev atlas ops scenario run --scenario warm-start

scenarios.description: Runtime restart resumes expected state without corruption.
scenarios.entrypoint: bijux dev atlas ops scenario run --scenario restart-resume

scenarios.description: Artifact checksum verification enforces integrity before serve.
scenarios.entrypoint: bijux dev atlas ops scenario run --scenario artifact-integrity

scenarios.description: Read-only mode serves queries while ingest remains disabled.
scenarios.entrypoint: bijux dev atlas ops scenario run --scenario readonly-mode

scenarios.description: Offline execution path with prefetched artifacts and no network access.
scenarios.entrypoint: bijux dev atlas ops scenario run --scenario offline-mode

scenarios.description: Resource-constrained profile validates graceful degradation behavior.
scenarios.entrypoint: bijux dev atlas ops scenario run --scenario low-resource

scenarios.description: High parallel query load verifies concurrency correctness and stability.
scenarios.entrypoint: bijux dev atlas ops scenario run --scenario high-concurrency

scenarios.description: Concurrent ingest and query traffic validates mixed-workload behavior.
scenarios.entrypoint: bijux dev atlas ops scenario run --scenario mixed-load
